name: Figure Skating Legends
short_description: Step into the dazzling world of ice and artistry with Figure Skating Legends, the ultimate figure skating experience! Whether you're a seasoned skating enthusiast or a curious newcomer, this game invites you to glide, spin, and jump your way to glory.
detailed_description:
Step into the dazzling world of ice and artistry with Figure Skating Legends, the ultimate figure skating experience! Whether you're a seasoned skating enthusiast or a curious newcomer, this game invites you to glide, spin, and jump your way to glory.

Features

Design Your Own Programs

Unleash your creativity by choreographing custom figure skating routines! Choose from a wide array of moves, including elegant spirals, breathtaking spins, and intricate footwork sequences. Add flair to your programs with six iconic jumps: Axel, Toe Loop, Loop, Flip, Salchow, and Lutz. Pair your choreography with music that matches your vision—now, you can even upload your own music in MP3 or WAV format. Additionally, personalize your skater’s appearance by uploading custom textures in PNG, JPEG, or JPG formats.

Score Like a Pro

  • Technical Score: Earn points by executing precise elements, including jumps, step sequences, choreographic sequences, and spins. The better your execution, the higher your technical score, rewarding your mastery of figure skating's core techniques.

  • Component Score: Enhance your artistry by synchronizing movements with the music and collecting components scattered across the ice. These components unlock additional animations, making your performance more dynamic and visually stunning while boosting your overall score.

Compete Against the Best
Challenge players worldwide and climb the leaderboards! Perform your routines and earn scores based on artistry, technique, and execution. Can you achieve a perfect score and earn the title of "Legendary Skater"?

Dynamic Career Mode
Start your journey as a beginner skater and rise through the ranks. Compete in regional tournaments, impress international judges, and earn your spot at the prestigious Legends Championship.

Authentic Skating Physics
Experience realistic skating mechanics that bring the ice to life. Perfect your timing to land stunning combinations, or risk it all with ambitious moves. The choice is yours!

Customization
Immerse yourself in breathtaking arenas and detailed costumes that capture the glamour of figure skating. Customize your character's look with options to express your unique style.

Choose Your Skater

Step into the rink as either a male or female skater, each with unique animations and customizable outfits. Express your style and personality as you compete to become a legend on the ice!

Disclaimer
While inspired by the artistry and athleticism of real-world figure skating, Figure Skating Legends is an independent game and has no affiliation with the International Skating Union (ISU) or any official figure skating organisations.

Take to the ice and become a legend in Figure Skating Legends! The rink awaits your artistry and skill—are you ready to leave your mark?
